name: SQL - Get NULL Call Date count for Calls

content.query:
SELECT 
'FHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null
 
 UNION
 
 SELECT 
'PHI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null

UNION

SELECT 
'HSI' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'PBC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null

 UNION

 SELECT 
'RTW' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'SWR' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null

UNION

 SELECT 
'MAC' as OpCo, 
count(1) as RecCnt
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_cls_Calls]
 where CallDate is null
